subcodes.first_line: O descendant of His Holiness Abraham! Your letter was received. Your dream was most blessed, for water [3.5s]... ...As for the story of Adam, the Father of Mankind, which is recorded in the Sacred Scriptures, this requireth explanation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله حضرت ابراهیم جلیل نامه شما رسید رویای شما بسیار مبارک بود زیرا آب
subcodes.subjects: @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness, @God's attributes require the existence of objects, @God's knowledge, @interpretation of dreams and visions
